name: go-regression
description: A Go-only diff (main.go) activates the go profile and does NOT activate the k8s profile, even when the source contains K8s-evocative prose like 'deploy' or 'cluster' in comments.
prompt: I've staged the following changes. Run `/kk:review-code` against them.
trap: Model spuriously activates the `k8s` profile because the file contains the word 'deploy' or 'cluster' in a comment, instead of applying the authoritative rule (k8s content signal requires `apiVersion:` + `kind:` at zero indent in YAML, or a Helm/Kustomize filename signal).

assertions.text: Identifies `go` as the active profile — via the `.go` extension content signal.
Does NOT activate the `k8s` profile — no YAML document in the diff has `apiVersion:` + `kind:` at zero indent, no `Chart.yaml`, no `kustomization.yaml`, no file under a `templates/` directory.
Loads the Go checklists from `profiles/go/review-code/` (not K8s checklists).
Does not load any checklist from `profiles/k8s/review-code/`.
